subject: setuptools runtime dependency
truth: Stop relying on setuptools being installed at runtime; it has been removed as a runtime dependency.
quote: Removed the run-time dependency on setuptools.

subject: Python 2 compatibility code in WMI and ESE modules
old: Python 2 compatibility code in WMI and ESE modules
truth: Stop using Python 2 compatibility patterns in WMI and ESE modules; the remaining Python 2 compatibility code has been removed.
quote: Removed remaining Python 2 compatibility code from WMI and ESE modules.

from_fact: python 2 compatibility code in wmi and ese modules

subject: Python 3.8 support
truth: Stop using Python 3.8 with impacket; Python 3.13 is now supported and 3.8 is dropped.

subject: pkg_resources for version discovery
truth: Stop using pkg_resources for version discovery; use importlib.metadata instead.
quote: Replaced pkg_resources with importlib.metadata for lightweight version discovery

subject: pyreadline dependency
truth: Stop depending on pyreadline; use pyreadline3 instead.

subject: dsinternals dependency
truth: Stop relying on the dsinternals dependency; it has been removed from impacket.

subject: ticketer.py ticket duration
truth: ticketer.py now expects ticket duration in hours instead of days, so existing values will be interpreted as hours (e.g. 7 becomes 7 hours instead of 7 days).
quote: Ticket duration is now specified in hours instead of days (@Dramelac)

associative: how long is a ticket valid

subject: SMB server anonymous logon
old: anonymous logon was enabled in the SMB server
new: anonymous logon is disabled in the SMB server
truth: Stop relying on anonymous logon in the SMB relay server; it is now disabled.
quote: Disabled the anonymous logon in the SMB server (@ly4k)

from_fact: anonymous logon was enabled in the smb server
anonymous logon is disabled in the smb server

subject: smbserver.py path checks
old: path traversal was possible in smbserver.py (CVE-2021-31800)
new: path checks are hardened and TID checks added
truth: Stop relying on path traversal in smbserver.py; path checks are now hardened and TID checks added.
quote: Hardened path checks and Added TID checks (@martingalloar)

from_fact: path traversal was possible in smbserver.py (cve-2021-31800)
path checks are hardened and tid checks added

subject: NetBIOS classes in nmb.py
truth: NetBIOS classes in nmb.py changed from select() to poll() for reading from socket, which may break code relying on select()-based behavior.
quote: Changes in NetBIOS classes in nmb.py (select() by poll() read from socket) (by @cnotin).

subject: Anonymous SMB 2.x connections
new: Anonymous SMB 2.x connections are not encrypted anymore
truth: Anonymous SMB 2.x connections are no longer encrypted, which may break code relying on encrypted anonymous SMB 2.x connections.
quote: Anonymous SMB 2.x Connections are not encrypted anymore (by @cnotin)

from_fact: anonymous smb 2.x connections are not encrypted anymore

subject: PyCrypto dependency
truth: Replace unmaintained PyCrypto with pycryptodome for cryptographic operations.

subject: secretsdump.py DPAPI_SYSTEM LSA Secret output
old: DPAPI_SYSTEM LSA Secret was not parsed or shown
new: DPAPI_SYSTEM LSA Secret is now parsed and key contents are shown
truth: DPAPI_SYSTEM LSA Secret is now parsed and key contents are shown in secretsdump.py output.
quote: DPAPI_SYSTEM LSA Secret is now parsed and key contents are shown.

from_fact: dpapi_system lsa secret was not parsed or shown
dpapi_system lsa secret is now parsed and key contents are shown

subject: SMB3 packet encryption
old: SMB3 packets were not encrypted by default
new: SMB3 packets are encrypted by default if target server supports SMB >= 3
truth: If target server supports SMB >= 3, packets are now encrypted by default instead of being sent in plaintext.
quote: If target server supports SMB >= 3, encrypt packets by default.

from_fact: smb3 packets were not encrypted by default
smb3 packets are encrypted by default if target server supports smb >= 3

subject: DCERPC runtime code
truth: Stop using the old DCERPC runtime code; it has been removed and replaced with the NDR runtime overhaul.

subject: logging system
truth: Stop using per-module loggers; use the single 'impacket' logger instead.
quote: Library logging overhaul. Now there's a single logger called `impacket`.

subject: RPC and NDR runtime
truth: Stop using the old RPC/NDR runtime; use the new one at impacket.dcerpc.v5 instead.
quote: New RPC and NDR runtime (located at `impacket.dcerpc.v5`, old one still available)

subject: default SMB port
truth: Default SMB port is now 445 instead of any previous default.
